license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qncdvaw
title: iGEM 2018 Interlab Study Protocol: Calibration 1
author: Ylenia Longo

steps_raw.instruction: Add 100µl LUDOX solution into wells A1,B1, C1 and D1 of a 96 well plate.
Add 100µl ddH20 into wells A2,B2,C2 and D2 of a 96 well plate.
Measure absorbance at 600nm of all samples. Make sure to use the same measurement modes that will be used for the cell measurements.
Import your data into the Excel sheet provided by iGEM (OD600 reference point tab)
